name: acm-mm-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM Multimedia (ACM MM) submissions: multimedia-vs-computer-vision routing, OpenReview submission checks, thematic-area targeting, anonymous rebuttal, ACM sigconf camera-ready, Open Source and Reproducibility tracks, ACM artifact badging, supplementary media, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and the SIGMM calendar. Grounded in the official ACM MM 2026 site, OpenReview groups, ACM Digital Library, dblp, and sigmm.org checked on 2026-07-09.
